/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Os -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.43-point-to-point-default.so -o ../../lib/libns3.43-point-to-point-default.so "CMakeFiles/point-to-point.dir/helper/point-to-point-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/point-to-point.dir/model/point-to-point-channel.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/point-to-point.dir/model/point-to-point-net-device.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/point-to-point.dir/model/ppp-header.cc.o"   -L/home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib:::::::::::::::::::::::::::: -Wl,--no-as-needed ../../lib/libns3.43-network-default.so -Wl,--as-needed ../../lib/libns3.43-stats-default.so ../../lib/libns3.43-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgsl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgslcblas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so
